title: neea tenuis
intro: Neea tenuis, also known as the West Indian gardenia or false gardenia, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthraquinone glycosides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Neea tenuis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used to make a poultice or ointment for topical application.
